title: TUI Operator Actions V1 Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for delivering TUI-based operator actions, scoped execution behavior, feedback messaging, regression coverage, documentation, and final review for the operator-controls spec.
acceptance_criteria: Run controls, retry, merge, and quick status updates are planned under this feature root rather than as standalone top-level work.
The plan preserves existing TUI behavior while adding scoped operator actions and status feedback.
Implementation, testing, documentation, and review work are represented as child beads with explicit dependencies and file scope.
